description.en:
Sorts your husbandries alphabetically in the Animals menu for easier management and navigation.
Features: - Automatically sorts husbandries by the names you have given them - Optionally hide empty husbandries - toggle in Game Settings - No configuration required for sorting - just install and enjoy
Changelog: 1.1.0.0-dev.1: - Added option to hide empty husbandries from the Animals menu, toggle in Game Settings (based on R2TW.!'s edit) - Added multiplayer support
1.0.1.0: - Improved internal code structure and logging for better diagnostics - Added automated test suite for reliability
1.0.0.0: - Initial release - Automatically sorts husbandries alphabetically by name in the Animals menu
Documentation: https://github.com/rittermod/FS25_AlphabeticalHusbandries
